response: the sacred text of siriragau mahala 3 speaks of the spirit that is found through devotion and the grace of the guru - the path of true spirituality is only possible with the guidance of the guru - the soul must merge with the self to become pure - the word of the true lord is the key to spiritual enlightenment - gene of devotion is passed through generations - language of the soul is beyond words - visit the holy places to feel the divine presence - the guru is the light that guides the way - the spirit is awakened through the sacred words - the visit to the guru is the highest form of devotion - the language of the heart is the true language of the spirit - the gene of faith is the foundation of spiritual life - the spirit is the essence of the soul - the visit to the guru is the path to liberation -
